name: Central Plaza Hotel Public Company Limited
summary: Central Plaza Hotel Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates in the hotel business in Thailand and internationally. It operates in two segments, Hotel and Related Services Operation; and Food and Ice-Cream. As of December 31, 2020, the company operated or developed 84 hotels and resorts with 17,358 rooms under the Centara Hotels & Resorts brand across 14 countries. It is also involved in the food and beverage, hotel management, and import and export businesses, as well as operates a spa. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
